subject: [PATCH v7 13/20] nfsd: allow nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change() to work with no export

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch allows the nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change() function to work even when there is no export available, which can occur in certain situations such as a CB_NOTIFY callback. The change ensures that the function behaves correctly and safely in these cases by adding a check for the presence of an export before attempting to access it. This patch addresses a specific edge case where nfsd would not grant a delegation on the V4 root, making this modification necessary.
